market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: SpaceX IPO closes up 19% and delivers the world’s first trillionaire
articles.description: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
articles.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

articles.title: SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell just gave another hint at a Tesla merger
articles.description: A SpaceX-Tesla merger seems inevitable.

articles.title: Bitcoin hit bottom at $59,000 marking end to the crypto winter, says Standard Chartered analyst
articles.description: Senior market analyst Geoffrey Kendrick pointed to the SpaceX IPO and a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal as the dual catalysts ending the recent crypto selloff.

articles.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
articles.description: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

articles.title: Google sues alleged Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to send scam texts
articles.description: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

articles.title: Robinhood sees ‘record-breaking’ traffic after SpaceX stock debuts
articles.description: The trading platform says some customers experienced intermittent disruptions, but those issues have resolved.

articles.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
articles.description: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.

articles.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
articles.description: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Half of that bunch

articles.title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
articles.description: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
articles.description: Tokenized RWAs surge despite crypto volatility, Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks, prediction markets outpace onchain gambling and Sam Bankman-Fried seeks a Trump pardon.

articles.title: VanEck bets BNB’s real-world usage can stand out in a crowded crypto ETF market
articles.description: VanEck says BNB’s user activity and revenue generation make it a stronger long-term crypto investment case than many blockchain projects still selling a vision.

articles.title: 職業婦女靠 AI 工具打理零碎家務，「把時間買回來」陪孩子
articles.description: 美國一名職業婦女分享，將 AI 匯入家庭後，表示每週可省下至少 10 小時，也因此更有時間陪伴孩子。她說，AI […]

articles.title: 距離外星生命史上最近？調查顯示學界態度：從「強烈否定」走向「保守中立」
articles.description: 人類似乎正處於發現外星生命的邊緣。2025 年 4 月，媒體引用天文學家的論文，證實在系外行星 K2-18b  […]

articles.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX soars 20% in blockbuster Nasdaq debut
articles.description: The stock was trading above $160 in volatile action after last night's IPO at $135.

articles.title: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX’s historic IPO
articles.description: The SpaceX IPO has boosted Musk's paper wealth to more than $1,000,000,000,000 at a time when he is more hated -- and powerful -- than ever.

articles.title: Bloomberg Analyst: Most Bitcoin ETF Investors Have Stayed Put Despite Outflows
articles.description: Bitcoin ETF investors have pulled billions this year, but the broader crypto ETF market remains more resilient than recent headlines suggest.

articles.title: Kalshi’s crypto perpetuals spark debate over whether they’re futures or swaps
articles.description: A clash between derivatives veterans is exposing a deeper discussion over how U.S. regulators should classify crypto perpetual contracts.

articles.title: The U.S. government is betting $2 Billion on quantum computing, and the defense side can't keep up
articles.description: Pruden argues that to defend against a quantum computer capable of cryptographically relevant operations, we need post-quantum cryptography and regulatory coordination that the industry has been deferring for years.

articles.title: FTX's Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal of criminal conviction on fraud, conspiracy charges
articles.description: The onetime FTX CEO did not persuade a panel of judges that his trial was unfair, the appeals court panel ruled Friday.
